cases.title: In-window check-in stored with timestamp per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event is InProgress with check-in window active (fixed clock now satisfies checkinOpenAt <= now < checkinCloseAt)
Participant has registration in Registered state with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin with check-in capability for the event
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext) at in-window time
Query checkin_records and registration state for the participant
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 row satisfied: CheckinRecord persisted with non-null checkinAt timestamp; registration transitions to CheckedIn; BR-10 satisfied because check-in occurred within valid window (checkinOpenAt <= now < checkinCloseAt); audit metadata persisted per BR-13

cases.title: Out-of-window check-in rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event is InProgress with configured check-in window not containing fixed clock now
Participant has registration in Registered state with no prior check-in
Authenticated staff actor with check-in capability for the event
steps: Set fixed clock to a time outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext)
Inspect thrown error code and database state
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 row satisfied: out-of-window check-in is rejected with stable error code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Staff check-in within window persists CheckinRecord and state transition in one DB transaction
preconditions: Real database fixture with Registered participant and active check-in window
No existing CheckinRecord for the registration
Staff actor context with operatorId
Fixed clock now satisfies checkinOpenAt <= now < checkinCloseAt
steps: Execute staff check-in through checkinService against real Postgres
Query checkin_records row and registrations.state in the same database session immediately after commit
cases.expected: Exactly one CheckinRecord row with checkinAt within window bounds; registration state is CheckedIn; no partial write (record without state change or vice versa)

cases.title: Check-in before CheckinOpenAt is rejected at module boundary
preconditions: Event is InProgress with checkinOpenAt in the future relative to fixed clock now
Participant has Registered registration with no prior check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin with check-in capability
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly before checkinOpenAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext) against real Postgres
Query checkin_records and registration state for the participant
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Check-in after CheckinCloseAt is rejected at module boundary
preconditions: Event is InProgress or Completed with checkinCloseAt in the past relative to fixed clock now
Participant has Registered registration with no prior check-in
Authenticated staff actor with check-in capability
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly after checkinCloseAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext) against real Postgres
Verify database state for check-in and registration
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord created; registration state unchanged (Registered)

cases.title: Valid in-window check-in transitions registration Registered to CheckedIn
preconditions: Registration in Registered state before check-in
Event check-in window contains fixed clock now (checkinOpenAt <= now < checkinCloseAt)
No prior valid check-in on the registration
steps: Record beforeState as Registered from registration repository
Submit valid in-window check-in via checkinService
Read afterState from registration repository and CheckinRecord
cases.expected: beforeState Registered, afterState CheckedIn per state machine; validCheckin guard satisfied (in-window per BR-10); checkinAt timestamp recorded

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/checkins returns HTTP 200 when within check-in window
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with active check-in window containing current (or simulated) time
Registered participant with valid registrationId
OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin JWT scoped to the event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } and Authorization bearer token
Read response body and registration state
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt, registrationState CheckedIn; check-in recorded within BR-10 window bounds

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/checkins returns HTTP 422 with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED when outside window
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with check-in window not containing current (or simulated) time
Registered participant with valid registrationId
Staff or admin JWT with scope for the event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } while outside configured window
Parse error envelope from response body
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED and user-safe message; no successful check-in payload returned

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/self-checkin succeeds in-window and rejects out-of-window
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Authenticated participant JWT for Registered registration with no prior check-in
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token at in-window time
Repeat with clock or fixture moved outside window for a fresh registration
cases.expected: In-window request returns HTTP 200 with checkinAt and CheckedIn state; out-of-window request rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED per BR-10

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle check-in step succeeds only when within configured window
preconditions: E2E Flow A fixture: event progressed through publish, open-registration, and participant Registered
Event started (InProgress) with check-in window open
Participant or staff token from prior registration step
steps: Execute Flow A check-in step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin or staff checkins for the registered participant while window is open
Verify response before proceeding to feedback step
cases.expected: Check-in response HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt and CheckedIn state within BR-10 window, enabling subsequent feedback and eligibility steps

cases.title: Participant denied staff check-in endpoint regardless of window state
preconditions: Event InProgress with check-in window open
Registered participant with valid registrationId
Authenticated JWT for participant only (no staff check-in capability)
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with participant JWT and body { registrationId } for own registration
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized per roles matrix; insufficient check-in capability; no CheckinRecord created even when BR-10 window is open

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied check-in on event outside assigned scope
preconditions: Event InProgress with check-in window open but event not assigned to staff actor
Registered participant on that event
Authenticated OrganizerStaff JWT without scope for eventId
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff JWT and valid registrationId while window is open
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per scope policy; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration state unchanged despite open check-in window

cases.title: Organizer check-in console blocks submission when check-in window is closed
preconditions: OrganizerStaff logged in on event check-in screen with assigned event scope
Event InProgress but current time is outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
Registered participant visible in attendance list
steps: Open organizer check-in operations console at /organizer/events/{eventId}/check-in
Attempt to check in a registered participant via UI control
Observe inline or toast error messaging
cases.expected: UI does not record check-in; participant row remains unchecked-in; window-closed feedback consistent with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED server semantics

cases.title: Participant self check-in UI succeeds when check-in window is open
preconditions: Event with self check-in enabled and window currently open (now >= checkinOpenAt and now < checkinCloseAt)
Participant logged in with Registered status for the event
Event in InProgress state allowing check-in
steps: Navigate to event self check-in page for the registered event
Trigger primary check-in action control
Observe success confirmation and check-in status display
cases.expected: UI shows check-in succeeded with visible timestamp or checked-in indicator; registration status reflects CheckedIn state per BR-10 in-window policy

cases.title: Check-in at CheckinOpenAt boundary is recorded with timestamp
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinOpenAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff or self check-in at the boundary instant checkinOpenAt
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in succeeds per BR-10 window policy (inclusive open boundary); checkinAt is persisted at or after checkinOpenAt and registration is CheckedIn

cases.title: Check-in at checkinCloseAt boundary is rejected per exclusive close boundary
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinCloseAt (now >= checkinOpenAt and now < checkinCloseAt is false)
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff or self check-in at the close boundary instant
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; exclusive close boundary treats checkinCloseAt as out-of-window (valid window is checkinOpenAt <= now < checkinCloseAt); registration stays Registered

cases.title: Out-of-window rejection preserves Registered state for attendance reconciliation
preconditions: Event InProgress with closed check-in window (now after checkinCloseAt)
Registered participant never checked in
Event completion workflow available in test harness
steps: Attempt check-in after window close and confirm rejection
Run event completion / attendance finalization for the event
Query registration terminal state for the participant
cases.expected: No CheckinRecord exists; after completion participant is marked Absent (not Attended) because BR-10 prevented valid check-in

cases.title: Duplicate POST checkins outside window return CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED not CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED
preconditions: Event outside check-in window
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Staff JWT and two distinct Idempotency-Key values
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins twice with different Idempotency-Key headers while window is closed
Inspect both error responses
cases.expected: Both attempts return CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; BR-10 window guard applies before BR-11 duplicate check-in evaluation

cases.title: Concurrent out-of-window check-in requests all fail without creating records
preconditions: Registered participant with no prior check-in
Check-in window closed (now outside bounds)
Two or more parallel check-in requests for the same registrationId
steps: Fire concurrent staffCheckin (or API POST) calls while window is closed
Count checkin_records rows and inspect registration state after all requests settle
cases.expected: All requests fail with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; zero CheckinRecord rows created; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Check-in window validation runs before duplicate check-in guard in pipeline
preconditions: Registered participant with existing valid CheckinRecord (BR-11 would apply)
Event InProgress but current time outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
steps: Attempt second check-in for the same registration while window is closed
Inspect error code on failure
cases.expected: Failure code is CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED (not CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED), confirming pipeline step 2 (event check-in window) executes before step 3 (existing valid check-in check)

cases.title: Fixed clock abstraction drives all BR-10 window boundary tests consistently
preconditions: Test harness provides injectable clock abstraction per testing plan deterministic controls
Event with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt boundaries
steps: Set clock to one second before open, attempt check-in, observe rejection
Set clock to in-window, attempt check-in, observe success
Set clock to one second after close, attempt check-in on a fresh registration, observe rejection
cases.expected: All three outcomes are reproducible across test runs with identical clock fixtures; no flaky time-dependent BR-10 results
